## What does this PR do?

## Checklist for adding a tool

- [ ] It is a **client/orchestrator** for coding agents (not the agent itself, not generic infra). See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#what-belongs-here-inclusion-criteria).
- [ ] It is **real and reachable** (official site and/or public repo).
- [ ] It is **not a duplicate** or a fork/mirror of a listed tool.
- [ ] Added to the **single most appropriate** section, in the standard entry format.
- [ ] Description is **one neutral sentence**, no marketing language.
- [ ] Metadata sub-line includes `repo`/`closed-source` · license · platforms · agents · *Distinctive:*.
- [ ] Updated the [Contents](../README.md#contents) table if I added a new section.
